x-enumeration-literals.name: First Payment Date Time
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date on which the first payment for a Standing Order schedule will be made. (Open Banking)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Next Payment Date Time
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date on which the next payment for a Standing Order schedule will be made. (Open Banking)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Last Payment Date Time
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date on which the last (most recent) payment for a Standing Order schedule was made. (Open Banking)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Final Payment Date Time
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date on which the final payment for a Standing Order schedule will be made. (Open Banking)
